\tzpentry{ID5647}{Displacement Field}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5647 introduces Displacement Field as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\begin{equation} \textbackslash{}Delta\_\{ij\} = |\textbackslash{}Omega\_i - \textbackslash{}Omega\_j|. \end{equation}
